novel_features.name: Signed cross-surface context bundle
novel_features.description: Package an Account plus contacts, opps, cases, activities, chatter, linked Slack channels, and Data Cloud profile into one signed JSON bundle any agent can consume.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining Salesforce REST + UI API + Data Cloud + Slack linkage with FLS + compliance redactions applied per-record - no existing tool does this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents need a single portable artifact they can reason over without calling the org 14 times. Use this when an agent needs full Customer 360 context.

novel_features.name: Offline bundle verification
novel_features.description: Verify a previously-generated bundle is signed by the real org, has not been tampered with, and has not expired. Works offline against a cached key.
novel_features.rationale: JWS with a key registered as an org Certificate creates a trust root the agent host can verify without calling Salesforce.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Before an agent trusts and operates on CRM context, verify the bundle is real. Strict mode adds deep byte-level file-hash checks.

novel_features.name: Opp-centric narrative brief
novel_features.description: Render a human-readable markdown plus structured JSON brief of a single opportunity.
novel_features.rationale: Deterministic template joining Opp + linked contacts + recent activities + FeedItem posts - Salesforce shows this in the UI, not via JSON export.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Fast hand-off to an LLM for deal prep, sales call context, or forecasting review.

novel_features.name: Customer 360 freshness scoring
novel_features.description: 0-100 freshness score across activity staleness, opp stage drift, case silence, and chatter quiet.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-cloud signal aggregation from local SQLite that no single Salesforce API call returns.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surface which accounts need rep attention before they churn. Useful in pipeline review agents.

novel_features.name: Channel-audience FLS intersection
novel_features.description: Post a bundle summary to a Slack channel with FLS intersected across the channel audience, not just the sender.
novel_features.rationale: Slack channel members may not all have access to the same Salesforce fields - naive posting leaks restricted data.
novel_features.why_it_matters: The only Slack integration that checks every channel member's FLS before posting Salesforce data.

novel_features.name: Trust key registration
novel_features.description: Register the local device's bundle-signing public key as a Salesforce Certificate (preferred) or CMDT fallback with hash-chained receipt.
novel_features.rationale: Certificate path uses Salesforce's native audit trail; CMDT fallback uses a hash chain resistant to admin overwrite attacks.
novel_features.why_it_matters: One-time setup so bundles from your laptop carry an org-anchored trust root.

novel_features.name: Competing-tool yield in doctor
novel_features.description: Detect Agentforce MCP or DX MCP presence and recommend yielding to those tools when they cover a need.
novel_features.rationale: CLIs traditionally assert dominance; graceful yield is rare and useful to developers evaluating tool choice.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents calling doctor before using this CLI can pick the best tool for the job automatically.

novel_features.name: Dry-run bundle preview
novel_features.description: Preview exactly what fields would be exported from the org without writing to disk or signing.
novel_features.rationale: Compliance teams need pre-approval review without producing the artifact.

narrative.headline: The agent-context packager for Salesforce. Signed, FLS-safe, cross-surface bundles any agent can consume.
narrative.value_prop: Salesforce Headless 360 shipped the raw APIs and two MCP servers. What's missing is a portable, verifiable context bundle: a signed JSON that joins an Account plus contacts, opps, cases, activities, chatter, linked Slack channels, and Data Cloud profile - with FLS and compliance redactions applied once, verifiable offline, consumable by Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, Agentforce, or any self-hosted agent. That is what salesforce-headless-360-pp-cli produces.
narrative.auth_narrative: Multi-org auth: reuses your existing `sf` CLI auth when installed, supports JWT Bearer for CI, and falls back to a PKCE-protected OAuth Web Server flow. JWT mode blocks bundle generation without `--run-as-user` to prevent integration-user FLS bypass. Per-org profiles live in `~/.config/pp/salesforce-headless-360/profiles/`.

quickstart.comment: Import an org you already have authed via the sf CLI
One-time: register this device's signing key with the org
Pull the Customer 360 for one account into local SQLite
Generate a signed bundle ready to hand to an agent
Verify the bundle before an agent consumes it

troubleshoots.fix: JWT mode requires --run-as-user <Id> to scope FLS. Pass a real user Id: `agent context <account> --run-as-user 005xx00000ABCDE`
Your local key is not registered with that org. Run `trust register --org <alias>` first.
Optional. Data Cloud is required only for `agent context --include-data-cloud`. If you do not use Data Cloud, ignore.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent needs trusted Customer 360 context from a Salesforce org. Especially: meeting prep with fresh cross-cloud data, pipeline review agents scoring deal freshness, AI integrations that must respect FLS and compliance policies, bundle verification before acting on CRM data.

recipes.title: Meeting prep context for Claude Code
recipes.command: salesforce-headless-360-pp-cli agent context acme-corp --since 30d --agent > bundle.json && cat bundle.json | claude 'Summarize the state of this account'
recipes.explanation: Piping a signed bundle to Claude Code gives it grounded context without a separate API call.

recipes.title: Verify before act
recipes.command: salesforce-headless-360-pp-cli agent verify bundle.json --live --strict && my-agent --context bundle.json
recipes.explanation: Only act on bundles whose signature is fresh, org-live, and not expired.

recipes.title: Freshness triage for RevOps
recipes.explanation: Surface the specific signals that made an account stale.
